segs.src: Obviously to show you about England's goal
Jordan Pickford, from his goal kick
the ball actually is touched by the cable
attached to the cable camera above the stadium
drops down very quickly you can see
sorry, from Norway's goal kick I should say
it comes back very quickly to England
two passes later
it goes to Jude Bellingham
and in the back of the net
Now, afterwards, Starla Solbaken
the manager of Norway
not happy with the referee
Goalkeeper, of course, as well
he's pointing up and saying
it touched the cable on that cable camera
The manager of Norway pointing as well
Erling Haaland, not happy either
The rule, we've spoken to Mark Lattenberg
our rules expert
and he said
if the ball touches any outside object
then the whistle should go
and it should be
